violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the low boy milk coolers. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The bottom of the walk in cooler door was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026
The top of the three bay sink was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026
The bottom shelf of the baking prep table located in the back prep area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the area below the three bay have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-Food contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026
The grout in the kitchen and prep area floor is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2026

The door to the outside, located in the back room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025
The floor in the walk in cooler was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2025
The bottom shelf of the back stainless steel table was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025
The floor in the back room by the 3 bay sink was observed in poor repair areas of low grout. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2025
